title: 1 step DFU - Content of Software Update tab with Earbuds on latest FW and Charge Case on FW 5038
scenario: Software Update tab shows "Up to date" when earbuds are on latest firmware and Charge Case is on FW 5038 (non-1-step DFU)
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure the earbuds are connected and on the latest firmware.
Ensure the Charge Case is on firmware 5038 (which does not support 1-step DFU).
Navigate to the Software Update tab (e.g., via Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update).
Observe the status displayed on the Software Update tab.
expected: The Software Update tab shows "Up to date".
